overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk video game showing a walk through a gritty urban slum with heavy graffiti, burning vehicles, and scattered debris. The camera moves from a narrow graffiti-covered alley onto a street with views of distant corporate skyscrapers.

events.description: turns right from narrow alley corner into open street view

agents.ego_description: moving along the graffiti-covered wall and turning right to reveal the street

entered.detail: concrete wall covered in multicolored spray paint tags and art
red and white striped concrete road barriers
small concrete building with metal roll-up door
vehicle engulfed in flames with smoke rising

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with a close-up view of a heavily graffiti-covered concrete wall. The camera moves forward along the wall, passing red and white striped barriers, then turns right to reveal a small utility building and a burning car in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: street with burning vehicle and political graffiti

events.description: passing the burning car with active flames and smoke
approaching intersection and beginning left turn

agents.ego_description: walking past the burning vehicle and along the graffiti-covered walls

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in orange jacket and hat walking across the street

entered.detail: wall with large NO REGRETS text and political murals
piles of garbage bags and debris stacked on sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Walking down the street past the burning vehicle, the camera moves alongside a concrete utility building. A wall with prominent NO REGRETS graffiti appears on the right, along with piles of trash. A pedestrian in an orange jacket crosses the path as the camera approaches an intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: open street with view of distant corporate skyline

events.description: turns left onto main street revealing distant skyscrapers and overpass
encountering group of pedestrians walking in the street

agents.ego_description: turning left at the intersection and proceeding down the street toward the distant skyline

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red beanie and plaid shirt walking toward camera

entered.detail: futuristic skyscrapers visible in the distance beyond the slum buildings
elevated highway or monorail structure crossing the street
dilapidated concrete apartment building with balconies

segments.scene_description: Turning left at the intersection, the scene opens up to reveal a wide street with distant corporate skyscrapers visible beyond the slum buildings. An overpass structure appears on the left while pedestrians in casual clothing walk along the street. The burning car recedes into the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: street approaching overpass with distant towers

events.description: slight left turn while continuing down the street

agents.ego_description: continuing down the street passing pedestrians with the overpass structure ahead

entered.detail: red and white striped concrete barriers lining the street
wooden utility poles with overhead power lines crisscrossing the street

segments.scene_description: Continuing down the street, the camera approaches the overpass structure while passing more pedestrians. Red and white striped barriers line the right side of the street, and overhead power lines crisscross above. The distant skyscrapers remain visible on the left as the scene progresses toward the underpass area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a claustrophobic, graffiti-strewn alleyway into a wider urban slum that reveals a distant corporate skyline. It begins by gliding along a concrete wall covered in street art and passing striped barriers before turning right toward a burning car and a small utility building. As the camera moves past the wreckage and piles of trash, it passes a wall marked with NO REGRETS graffiti and a pedestrian in an orange jacket. The scene then opens up at a left turn, shifting from the narrow corridor to a wide street where the burning car recedes and towering skyscrapers emerge in the distance. Finally, the camera progresses toward a concrete overpass under a web of crisscrossing power lines, passing more pedestrians and striped barriers as it moves deeper into the city.
